g.title: leaderContract
g.text:
<<core interface>>
LeaderElector
+ runIfLeader(lockName): T?
+ runAsyncIfLeader(lockName)
+ state(lockName): LeaderState

g.title: suspendContract
g.text:
<<core suspend interface>>
SuspendLeaderElector
+ suspend runIfLeader(lockName)
+ runIfLeaderResultSuspend(slot)
coroutine context handle

g.title: groupContract
g.text:
<<core group interface>>
LeaderGroupElector
+ maxLeaders: Int
+ runIfLeader(lockName): T?
+ activeCount / availableSlots

g.title: suspendGroupContract
g.text:
<<core suspend group>>
SuspendLeaderGroupElector
+ maxLeaders: Int
+ suspend runIfLeader(lockName)
+ state(lockName): LeaderGroupState

g.title: hazelcastLeader
g.text:
<<blocking + async implementation>>
HazelcastLeaderElector
uses bluetape4k:leader:locks
creates HazelcastLock
autoExtend watchdog optional
async release is thread-unbound

g.title: singleDelegates
g.text:
<<renewal delegates>>
Single Extend Delegates
HazelcastLockExtendDelegate
HazelcastSuspendLockExtendDelegate
share lock with LeaderLockHandle
classify backend errors

g.title: hazelcastSuspend
g.text:
<<coroutine implementation>>
HazelcastSuspendLeaderElector
uses same single lock map
creates HazelcastSuspendLock
withContext(handle element)
NonCancellable release

g.title: hazelcastGroup
g.text:
<<slot group implementation>>
HazelcastLeaderGroupElector
uses group lock map
iterates lockName:slot:N
activeCount reads slot keys
group watchdog disabled

g.title: slotDelegates
g.text:
<<group renewal delegates>>
Slot Extend Delegates
HazelcastSlotExtendDelegate
HazelcastSuspendSlotExtendDelegate
extend lockName:slot:N
manual LockExtender path

g.title: hazelcastSuspendGroup
g.text:
<<coroutine slot group>>
HazelcastSuspend Group
HazelcastSuspendLeaderGroupElector
ensureActive while trying slots
creates suspend slot lock
NonCancellable slot release

g.title: hazelcastLock
g.text:
<<IMap token lock>>
HazelcastLock
token: Base58 fencing value
putIfAbsent(key, token, TTL)
remove(key, token)
replace + setTtl renewal

g.title: hazelcastSuspendLock
g.text:
<<suspend IMap token lock>>
HazelcastSuspendLock
blocking IMap wrapped in Dispatchers.IO
delay retry loop
token check before unlock
same extendDetailed contract

g.title: hazelcastMap
g.text:
<<runtime primitive>>
Hazelcast IMap Store
single map: bluetape4k:leader:locks
group map: bluetape4k:leader:group:locks
no CP Subsystem required
near-cache must stay disabled

g.title: hazelcastClassifier
g.text:
<<watchdog error policy>>
HazelcastBackendErrorClassifier
Retryable / TargetNotMember -> transient
WrongTarget -> transient
HazelcastException -> non-transient
feeds CompositeBackendErrorClassifier
